Now Hiring – Gudivada / Krishna District

Medical Representative Jobs in Gudivada, Krishna District

Crasenim Pharma is hiring Medical Representatives in Gudivada, a key commercial town in Krishna district, 45 km from Vijayawada. A growing private clinic sector and the strong prescription culture of Krishna district make this an attractive territory for MRs who want less competition than the state capital while still operating in a high-value pharma market. Full-time and commission-based roles are available now.

📍 Gudivada, Krishna District 💼 Full-Time + Commission Roles 🏆 1–4 Years Experience Preferred
💬 Apply via WhatsApp All Openings
Territory

Gudivada Pharma Market Overview

Gudivada is an important commercial town in Krishna district, located approximately 45 km from Vijayawada. The town has a growing private clinic sector and a developing specialist network, reflecting the wider Krishna district trend of rising healthcare investment. Importantly, the prescription culture in Krishna district is well established — doctors here respond well to regular, professional MR visits backed by quality products.

For an MR, Gudivada offers the advantage of operating within Vijayawada's high-value prescription corridor without the saturation and competition of the city itself. Sub-territory coverage includes Vuyyuru, Kaikaluru, and Gudlavalleru, giving the right candidate a compact yet productive territory to develop.

Key Markets – Gudivada Territory

Gudivada (HQ), Vuyyuru, Kaikaluru, Gudlavalleru, Chandarlapadu

  • Important commercial town 45 km from Vijayawada — good connectivity
  • Growing private clinic and specialist network in Krishna district
  • Strong prescription culture district-wide — doctors receptive to regular MR visits
  • Significantly less competitive than Vijayawada city — faster relationship building
  • Compact, manageable sub-territory ideal for focused field execution
  • Full training, product support, and incentive structure from Crasenim Pharma HQ
Job Openings

Pharma Vacancies in Gudivada, Krishna District

Medical Representative – Gudivada, Krishna District
📍 Gudivada, Krishna District💼 Full-Time🕒 1–3 Years
Now Hiring
  • Promote Crasenim Pharma products to GPs, clinics, specialists, and pharmacies in Gudivada
  • Cover Gudivada town and assigned sub-territory (Vuyyuru, Kaikaluru, or Gudlavalleru)
  • Competitive salary + travel allowance + monthly performance incentives
  • Product knowledge training and detailing material provided from day one
Commission-Based MR – Gudivada / Vuyyuru / Kaikaluru
📍 Gudivada / Vuyyuru / Kaikaluru💼 Commission🕒 Any Experience
Now Hiring
  • Earn monthly commission on prescriptions generated for Crasenim Pharma in the Gudivada area
  • Choose your sub-territory — Gudivada, Vuyyuru, Kaikaluru, or Gudlavalleru
  • No investment needed — immediate start for candidates with an existing doctor and pharmacy network
  • Monthly incentive bonuses tied to new clinic penetration and consistent target achievement
FAQs

Pharma MR Jobs in Gudivada – FAQ

Are there MR jobs available in Gudivada at Crasenim Pharma?
Yes. We have current openings for full-time Medical Representatives and commission-based MRs in Gudivada, Krishna district. Candidates with pharma sales experience in the Krishna district area are especially encouraged to apply.
Is the Gudivada territory close to Vijayawada — can I cover both?
Gudivada is around 45 km from Vijayawada and is treated as a standalone territory. It benefits from Krishna district's strong prescription culture without the intense competition of Vijayawada city. We assign focused territories so MRs can build genuine depth with their doctor base rather than spreading too thin.
How do I apply for a pharma MR job in Gudivada?
WhatsApp your name, experience, and territory preference to +91 99890 74806, email crasenimpharma@gmail.com, or fill out the application form on our Careers page. Mention Gudivada or Krishna district in your message.
